Application.featuresString: DISCOVER_SCHEMA, PROVISIONING, SYNC_PROVISIONING, DIRECT_PERMISSIONS, SEARCH, ENABLE, UNLOCK
Application.name: DB-Peoplesoft-HCM-Secondary

entry.value: Select * from PS_AHHR_SAILP_A_VW A where JOB_INDICATOR='S' and A.EFFDT = (Select max(A_ED.EFFDT) from PS_AHHR_SAILP_A_VW A_ED where A.EMPLID = A_ED.EMPLID and A.EMPL_RCD = A_ED.EMPL_RCD and (A_ED.EFFDT <= sysdate or ((A_ED.EFFDT <= sysdate + 45) and A_ED.EFFDT > sysdate and A_ED.ACTION in('HIR','REH')))) and A.EFFSEQ = (Select max(A_ES.EFFSEQ) from PS_AHHR_SAILP_A_VW A_ES where A.EMPLID = A_ES.EMPLID and A.EMPL_RCD = A_ES.EMPL_RCD and A_ES.EFFDT = A.EFFDT and (A_ES.EFFDT <= sysdate or ((A_ES.EFFDT <= sysdate + 45) and A_ES.EFFDT > sysdate and A_ES.ACTION in('HIR','REH')))) and not (SETID_LOCATION = 'ILARL' and PER_ORG = 'CWR')
